data.name: textBox8.Text
data.value:
How to start ---------------------------------------------------
--------------------------------------------------- Connect ---------------------------------------------------
Press "Connect" button to connect to CMMT. Before connect, observe Setting parameter
--------------------------------------------------- Take Control ---------------------------------------------------
Checked "Take control via modbus" to take control of CMMT
--------------------------------------------------- Control ---------------------------------------------------
Checked "Enable drive" to enable CMMT
Mode: Select one of the mode and press "Go" to execute - Homing: to go to homing position as set in FAS - Move absolute: to move to "Target position" with "Target velocity" as set in "Dynamic" - Move absolute: to move relatively to actual position to "Target position" with "Target velocity" as set in "Dynamic" - Record selection: to move to record selection as set in "Dynamic". Record selection must be set in FAS
Go: To execute above "Mode" Stop: To stop when move, and to resume, press "Go" Clear" After stop, when "Clear", last target will be cleared Ack: When this button is "Red", something is wrong, press "Ack" to acknowledge and clear error
Position limit switch Software: "checked" to activate software limit switch set in FAS Hardware: "checked" to activate hardware limit switch (external sensor)
Jog to jog+ and jog-, make sure override parameter is not 0
Test Start: Move to "Target Position" with "Target Velocity" and back to 0, repeat the cycle until "Stop" is performed
--------------------------------------------------- Setting ---------------------------------------------------
1. Connection
IP Address: - This is CMMT Modbus TCP IP Address - port XF1 IN
Cycle time: - Communication cycle time between cmmtt111.dll with CMMT-xx-EP
Modbus timeout: - No communication within this time, communication will break
2. Extended Parameter
Input Word: Number of bytes of FAS Extended parameter "Sent data" devided by 2 Output Word: Number of bytes of FAS Extended parameter "Received data" devided by 2
3. Factor Group
Position Output: Convert parameter of Target Position Velocity Output: Convert parameter of Target Velocity Position Input: Convert parameter of Actual Position Velocity Input: Convert parameter of Actual Velocity
Make use of Factor Group setting below, to determind Factor Group using parameter set in FAS
--------------------------------------------------- Dynamic ---------------------------------------------------
See "Control" for explanation of - Target position - Target velocity - Record selection
Override: - To override "Target Velocity", setting in percentage
Acceleration: - Percentage of acceleration set in FAS
Deceleration: - Percentage of deceleration set in FAS
Position unit: position user unit set in FAS Velocity unit: velocity user unit set in FAS
Time-out: - Command abort when reach time out
Wait: - Wait before check next condition
Homing - time-out: Homing abort when reach homing time out
--------------------------------------------------- Monitor IO ---------------------------------------------------
Write: "checked" to take control and enable user manipulation
